name: Call the Coin of Fate
text: Prophecy (As this resolves, predict heads or tails out loud, then balance a coin on its edge and let another player flick it.) Make a Prophecy. If correct: gain control of target creature until end of turn, it gains haste, and the table applauds (mandatory). If wrong: put two doom counters on the Doomsday Clock and return the borrowed luck.
flavorText: Heads it ascends, tails it descends, edge it transcends. (If it lands on edge, you win Magic. Briefly.)
